name: your-harness
description: Bootstrap or adopt a durable harness workflow in local repositories.

interface.shortDescription: Bootstrap or adopt a durable repo harness.
interface.longDescription: Create a fresh harness scaffold for a new repository or add the harness workflow to an existing codebase without overwriting existing files.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Your Harness to bootstrap a new repository scaffold or add the harness workflow to an existing project.
